name: Formocresol dental
curation_log: DRAFT generated by the LLM strawman (design §3 step 5) from real corpus samples — cheap and disposable, never authoritative. Requires the full M1 procedure (mining passes, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation) before launch.
Dry run on 50 corpus samples: coverage {'capacidad': 0.5, 'concentracion': 0.22}, illegal extractions 0.

attribute_defs.name: capacidad
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Identity: el volumen del frasco distingue presentaciones reales (10 cc=10 ml, 20 ml, 30 ml); cc se normaliza a ml por ser liquido.

attribute_defs.name: concentracion
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Identity: la concentracion (4% vs 7%) discrimina formulaciones distintas del antiseptico pulpar.
